//: Pins the .NET SDK feature band used by CopilotConnectorWorkflow's WinUI 3 surface. Matches the eval-ui-winui3 sibling repo (10.0.300, latestPatch, allowPrerelease=false). rollForward=latestPatch keeps us on patch-level updates only so a feature-band bump can't silently ship a new analyzer wave that breaks TreatWarningsAsErrors.
